strengths: ~19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used by Green Map
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI-powered products at scale — AI exposure is ~1 year of tooling work
Career history is senior/staff IC delivery roles, with no evidence of director-level strategic or organizational influence
No master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product strategy

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth vs. role's AI strategy focus
Experience length and entrepreneurial founder background

response.justification: The candidate clears the minimum bar: a BS in Computer Science and roughly 19 years of engineering experience spanning low-latency DLang microservices at Dunnhumby, TypeScript/AWS work at Optilyz, and founding GISCollective, which satisfies the entrepreneurial preference. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI-built products; the résumé shows only about one year of AI-agent tooling contributions at re:cinq and no advanced AI degree, publications, or shipped AI products. There is also no evidence of the required strategic responsibilities — advising strategic customers, setting cloud product direction, or leading through organizational influence; conference talks and workshops show teaching ability but not industry-recognized thought leadership. Strong senior/staff engineer, but the evidence does not support a principal-level AI strategy hire.
